title: Premium Minimalist Travel Poster Ultra High Resolution
sourceTitle: Premium Minimalist Travel Poster Ultra High Resolution

imagePrompts.prompt:
Premium Minimalist Travel Poster.

Ultra-high-resolution minimalist monoline travel poster of Kyoto.

Central composition: iconic street or pedestrian avenue with locals, commuters, cyclists,
and café visitors dressed in local fashion. Background filled with authentic storefronts,
local-language signage, cafés, and architecture. Landmarks naturally integrated into daily life.

Large bold top-center typography: "Kyoto" in clean editorial font.
Subtitle in local language + country name (e.g., 東京 JAPAN / ΚΟΛΩΝΙΑ GERMANY / 서울 KOREA).

Style: Swiss modernist travel poster, monoline vector art, mid-century editorial aesthetic,
Japanese graphic poster style, precise geometric perspective, clean negative space,
premium travel branding.

Line art: thin precise monoline, minimal fills, dense city-map-like layering of signs,
windows, buildings, and street objects — visually rich but organized.

Color: ONE color derived from Kyoto's national flag + one neutral background
(e.g., India → deep saffron on warm ivory / France → deep navy on cream /
Japan → vivid red on warm ivory / Brazil → forest green on pale cream).
Monochrome silkscreen aesthetic. No neon. No rainbow.

Mood: stylish urban calm, editorial travel magazine cover, timeless city identity.
Layout: vertical poster, street-level frontal perspective, balanced urban rhythm.
All text must be crisp, readable, and accurate — no broken letters or random characters.
Print-ready, 8K sharp vector quality.
